base_url.description: Your Zendesk Sunshine API base URL (e.g. https://yoursubdomain.zendesk.com/api/sunshine). No derived default: must be provided explicitly (see docs.md Known limits).

email.description: Zendesk agent email address, combined with api_token for HTTP Basic auth as '{email}/token'.

api_token.description: Zendesk API token, used as the Basic auth password alongside '{email}/token' as the username.

object_type.description: Optional legacy object type key to filter the objects stream (sent as the ?type= query param). Zendesk's Legacy Object Records endpoint requires at least one filter parameter; omitting this returns every type-unfiltered record the account exposes to an unfiltered request, matching legacy's own unfiltered call -- but the real API 400s if the account has no default-filterable view, see docs.md Known limits.

relationship_type.description: Optional legacy relationship type key to filter the relationships stream (sent as the ?type= query param). Same 400-without-a-filter caveat as object_type, see docs.md Known limits.
